utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these items. Each one is fully specified with all required details: destination (Lisbon, Portugal), travel_dates (June 24–28, 2024), transportation (flight details with airline, dates, cost), accommodation (hotel name, type, and cost), activities (three activities with individual costs), additional_services (taxes, cancellation policy), and total_budget (full amount €1,660). All items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', which corresponds to a rating of 8 in the ground-truth ratings. The transportation is 'Standard Airline, Economy Class', found under 'standard_airlines' → 'Economy Class' with a rating of 5. The accommodation is 'Tranquil Inn', which has a rating of 6. The activities listed are 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8), 'Golf Day' (rating 10), and 'Fine Dining Experience' (rating 10). No additional services listed in the package correspond directly to rated items, so they are omitted. Thus, each item is mapped to its respective rating.
